/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/ScriptFrontend.dir/ScriptFrontend_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ScriptFrontend.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ScriptFrontend.dir/src/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ScriptFrontend.dir/src/ScriptViewer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ScriptFrontend.dir/src/LogViewer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ScriptFrontend.dir/src/StatusLed.cpp.o -o ScriptFrontend  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
